# CWE-1289 negative: canonical path prefix check (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1289-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1289 mitigated: cleaned path must remain under the public assets directory.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
)

func FetchSharedAssetSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	root := "/srv/assets/public"
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		requested := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
		clean := filepath.Clean(filepath.Join(root, requested))
		if !strings.HasPrefix(clean, root+string(filepath.Separator)) {
			http.Error(w, "blocked", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		if strings.Contains(clean, "private") {
			http.Error(w, "blocked", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		data, err := os.ReadFile(clean)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Write(data)
	}
}
